KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub structured operation.
KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.title: KmaApiHubStructuredOutput

basedatetime.description: KMA village forecast version base datetime, YYYYMMDDHHMM. Use a recent KST datetime within the current APIHub retention window. Official parameter name: basedatetime. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getFcstVersion.
basedatetime.title: Basedatetime

data_type.description: Response format requested from KMA APIHub. XML is the official sample/default; JSON may be used only when the operation supports it. Official parameter name: dataType. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getFcstVersion.
data_type.title: Data Type

ftype.description: KMA APIHub request parameter ftype. Official parameter name: ftype. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getFcstVersion.
ftype.title: Ftype

num_of_rows.description: Number of rows to return. Use the default unless more rows are needed. Official parameter name: numOfRows. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getFcstVersion.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

page_no.description: Page number, 1-based. Use the default unless the citizen asks for another page. Official parameter name: pageNo. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getFcstVersion.
page_no.title: Page No
